description: An authoritative, no-nonsense competitive quotation orchestrator. Replaces generic SaaS blue with International Klein Blue and stark monochrome contrasts. Designed for speed, precision, and trust.

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary_foreground rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-secondary/80 transition-colors border border-border/50

components.inputs: rounded-none border-border/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary bg-background
components.badges: rounded-none px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider border

hero_orchestrator_bg.description: Macro photography of precise architectural grid, stark monochrome for landing page hero background

pricing_intelligence_abstract.description: Abstract geometric composition in International Klein Blue for pricing intelligence section
pricing_intelligence_abstract.placement: Pricing Intelligence Screen or Feature Section

modern_office_1.description: Modern office interior with white desks and black chairs
modern_office_1.placement: About Us or SME Portal Login Background

modern_office_2.description: Modern office interior with chairs and desks

pages_and_features.landing_page: High impact, Swiss bento grid. Use 'hero_orchestrator_bg' with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/70 via-black/40 to-transparent). Massive Chivo typography. Never center-align.
pages_and_features.sme_dashboard: Control Room Grid. No card shadows, 1px borders. IBM Plex Mono for all numeric KPIs. High density.
pages_and_features.rfp_detail_screen: Two-pane layout. PDF viewer on left, parsed intelligence on right. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout frame to maximize space.
pages_and_features.pricing_intelligence: Use 'pricing_intelligence_abstract' as a subtle header background. Data tables must use border-collapse with right/bottom borders only to expose the grid.
pages_and_features.approval_workflow: Drawer/Modal using Glassmorphism. Clear Accept/Reject buttons with prominent data-testid attributes.
pages_and_features.quotation_preview: A4 proportioned container with white background. Print-ready styling. Classic sans-serif typography for maximum readability by older business owners.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testids: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. e.g., 'submit-rfp-button', 'approve-quote-button', 'pricing-intelligence-tab'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure black/white contrast on key pricing data. Use primary blue only for primary CTAs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Override default shadcn card borders to 1px solid, remove border-radius (rounded-none).
Never use full-screen colored gradients. Rely on stark white/grey and 1px borders.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for precise, technical iconography. yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Ensure all major user actions include 'data-testid' attributes formatted as kebab-case, role-based.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Chivo.
